slide1.title: Explore Kerala, India
slide1.desc: Kerala, often called "God's Own Country," is a beautiful state in southern India known for its lush green landscapes, serene backwaters, picturesque hill stations, and rich cultural heritage.

slide2.title: Discover Varanasi
slide2.desc: Varanasi, also known as Kashi or Benaras, is one of the oldest living cities in the world. A sacred pilgrimage site on the banks of the Ganges River — a mesmerizing blend of rituals, history, and culture.

slide3.title: Mathura & Vrindavan
slide3.desc: Mathura, located in Uttar Pradesh, is believed to be the birthplace of Lord Krishna — offering deep spiritual and cultural experiences through ancient temples, vibrant festivals, and holy ghats.

themes.title: Explore by Theme
themes.subtitle: Discover India through lenses that match your travel style — from serene wellness retreats to historic odysseys.

whyIndia.title: Incredible India Awaits
whyIndia.subtitle: From ancient spiritual sites to breathtaking natural wonders — India offers a journey like no other.

ayurveda.title: AYURVEDA & WELLNESS
ayurveda.desc: A holistic approach from ancient India that balances body, mind, and spirit with natural therapies, herbal treatments, yoga, and meditation.

luxury.title: LUXURY TRAINS
luxury.desc: Luxury train journeys offer an unparalleled way to explore India's vibrant heritage, diverse landscapes, and timeless splendor.

spiritual.title: SPIRITUAL SITES
spiritual.desc: Visit the holy ghats of Varanasi, meditate in monasteries of Dharamshala, and explore the spiritual centers of Rishikesh and Haridwar.

historic.title: HISTORIC SITES
historic.desc: Hawa Mahal & Amber Fort in Jaipur, Taj Mahal in Agra, the intricate carvings of Khajuraho, and the ancient city of Hampi.

nature.title: NATURAL WONDERS
nature.desc: Lush tea plantations of Darjeeling, verdant hills of Munnar, wildlife forests of Jim Corbett, and coral reefs of the Andamans.

destinations.title: India Must See
destinations.subtitle: Handpicked destinations that capture the essence of Incredible India.

workflow.title: Our 9-Level Localization Workflow
workflow.subtitle: From basic translation to full AI-powered multilingual delivery — every step is built for precision, speed, and a seamless experience for travellers worldwide.

levels.title: Basic Translation
levels.desc: All page text — headings, body copy, buttons and labels — is automatically converted from English into the target language with a single click.

levels.title: Translation Memory
levels.desc: Previously translated strings are cached and reused instantly. Repeated phrases across pages stay consistent and translation speed increases over time.

levels.title: AI Quality Checker
levels.desc: An AI layer reviews every translated segment for accuracy, tone, cultural appropriateness, and brand voice before it is shown to the visitor.

levels.title: Auto-Translate New Content
levels.desc: When new packages, destinations, or blog posts are published, they are detected and translated automatically — no manual trigger required.

levels.title: SEO Localization
levels.desc: Meta titles, descriptions, URL slugs, alt text, and structured data are all localized so the Spanish site ranks on Google in Spanish-speaking markets.

levels.title: Image Translation
levels.desc: Text embedded within banners, infographics, and promotional images is detected and replaced with localized versions maintaining original design fidelity.

levels.title: Email Localization
levels.desc: Booking confirmations, enquiry responses, and promotional newsletters are automatically sent in the traveller's language for a seamless end-to-end journey.

levels.title: AI-Powered CMS
levels.desc: The content management system uses AI to flag untranslated strings, suggest improvements, and manage multilingual content versions from a single dashboard.

levels.title: Human in the Loop
levels.desc: Expert human translators and cultural consultants review AI outputs, approve final copy, and ensure the highest quality before publishing to live audiences.
